steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The rental costs \$92 for the first day and \$46 for each additional day. For $d$ total days there is 1 first day and $(d-1)$ additional days:$$C(d)=92+46(d-1)$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches the correct answer, $C(d) = 46d + 46$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
